targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(otziv_endpoint_duration_seconds_bucket{endpoint=~"$endpoint"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, endpoint)) and on(endpoint) sum(rate(otziv_endpoint_duration_seconds_count{endpoint=~"$endpoint"}[$__rate_interval])) by (endpoint) > 0

panels.title: Запросы в секунду по разделам и результату

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(increase(otziv_endpoint_duration_seconds_bucket{endpoint=~"$endpoint"}[$__range])) by (le, endpoint)) and on(endpoint) sum(increase(otziv_endpoint_duration_seconds_count{endpoint=~"$endpoint"}[$__range])) by (endpoint) > 0

panels.title: Самые медленные HTTP URI за период
